description: Comprehensive mobile touch interaction model for ERP design system. Maps desktop interactions to mobile-optimized gesture alternatives with accessibility compliance.

touchTargetMinimums.rationale: Minimum touch target sizes ensure accessibility for users with motor impairments and reduce accidental activation errors

gestureAlternatives.description: Content revealed on hover becomes visible on first tap, action on second tap

implementation.firstTap: Reveal hover state and any hidden actions (secondary buttons, delete icon, etc.)
implementation.tapOutside: Dismiss revealed state and return to default appearance
implementation.timing: Reveal persists for 3s or until tap-outside
implementation.visual: Apply background color or elevation change to indicate interactive state

gestureAlternatives.description: Tooltip content displayed in dismissible bottom sheet on long press or info button tap

implementation.dismiss: Swipe down or tap outside or tap close button
implementation.timing: Animates in with slide-up motion over 250ms
implementation.content: Include full tooltip text plus any additional contextual help

gestureAlternatives.mobileAlternative: full-screen selector or bottom sheet picker
gestureAlternatives.description: Dropdown menus expand to full-screen overlay or bottom sheet with better touch targeting

implementation.displayMode: full-screen modal or bottom sheet based on option count
implementation.threshold: If <6 options: bottom sheet; if >=6 options: full-screen modal
implementation.optionSize: 56px minimum height per option for touch targets
implementation.search: Searchable input field at top for options >10
implementation.dismiss: Tap outside, swipe down, or tap back/cancel button
implementation.timing: Animates in over 300ms with decelerate easing

gestureAlternatives.description: Right-click context menus become long-press menus or trailing swipe actions

implementation.secondaryTrigger: Swipe left to reveal trailing action buttons
implementation.menuFormat: Bottom sheet or popover with action items
implementation.animation: Contextual menu animates in from bottom or side
implementation.dismiss: Tap action, tap outside, swipe opposite direction
implementation.haptics: Provide haptic feedback on long-press activation

gestureAlternatives.desktopInteraction: click outside or ESC to dismiss
gestureAlternatives.description: Modals and sheets can be dismissed via downward swipe gesture

implementation.alternate: Tap outside or explicit close button always available
implementation.safeguard: Warn if unsaved changes will be lost

gestureAlternatives.description: Actions revealed via horizontal scroll on touch swipe

implementation.snap: Automatically snap to fully revealed or hidden state
implementation.spring: Use spring physics for natural snap animation
implementation.revertOnTap: Tapping elsewhere auto-reverts to hidden state

gestureAlternatives.description: Support pinch-zoom on images, maps, and data-dense content

implementation.animation: Smooth acceleration into zoom with decelerate easing
implementation.panAfterZoom: Allow pan/drag when zoomed beyond viewport

gestureAlternatives.description: Double-tap enables quick actions like like, edit mode, or expand

implementation.debounce: 200ms to distinguish from second tap of reveal gesture
implementation.feedback: Haptic feedback on successful double-tap detection

mobile.trigger: tap activates immediately with ripple feedback
long-press (500ms) on element or tap info icon
mobile.dismiss: swipe down, tap outside, or close button

mobile.display: full-screen modal for 6+ items, bottom sheet for <6 items

mobile.dismiss: tap action, swipe opposite, or tap outside

desktop.dismiss: click outside (if not blocking), ESC key, or close button

mobile.dismiss: swipe down, tap close button, or back button
mobile.position: Bottom sheet style or full-screen based on content

desktop.trigger: click or hover on trigger element

mobile.tap: tap-reveal if has submenu, immediate action if leaf item

mobile.minTouchTarget: 44px around entire link text and icon
mobile.feedback: Color change and slight scale on tap
mobile.longPress: Option to open in new context (share menu)

desktop.interact: click for navigation or tap-reveal for actions

mobile.tap: Reveal actions via tap-reveal if has actions
mobile.primaryAction: Tap anywhere on card for primary action

desktop.hover: highlight row, show actions in cells
desktop.interact: click to select, right-click for context menu

mobile.tap: Select row or show tap-reveal actions
mobile.longPress: Show context menu with all row actions

mobile.tap: Show tap-reveal actions or enter edit mode
mobile.longPress: Copy cell content to clipboard with haptic feedback

desktop.interact: click for primary action, hover to see secondary actions

mobile.tap: Primary action or tap-reveal for secondary actions
mobile.longPress: Show all actions in context menu

mobile.tap: Tap header to toggle expand/collapse

desktop.interact: click to select, click disclosure to expand

mobile.tap: Select item

mobile.focus: border color change, auto-scroll into view
mobile.keyboard: Show appropriate keyboard (tel, email, number, etc.)

desktop.hover: background highlight on label or checkbox

mobile.tap: Tap on checkbox or label text to toggle
Tap on button or label text to select
Tap to toggle or drag thumb

mobile.tooltip: Show value in bottom sheet or popover during drag

desktop.interact: click remove icon or click tag for action

mobile.tap: tap-reveal to show remove or other actions
mobile.remove: Tap X icon to remove tag

mobile.display: Same visual, tap opens details in bottom sheet

mobile.tap: tap-reveal to show remove option
Tap to select

mobile.dismiss: swipe down, auto-dismiss, or tap action

mobile.tap: Tap item to navigate
mobile.longPress: Show label tooltip if only icon shown

mobile.drag: Drag handle to dismiss or swipe down
mobile.dragHandle: Show visual indicator for drag interaction

mobile.dismiss: tap outside, swipe opposite direction, or tap item

mobile.tap: Execute primary action or show speed dial

mobile.animation: Scale and rotate animations for items

mobile.focus: keyboard input, suggestions in bottom sheet or overlay

mobile.tap: Open image in full-screen viewer

desktop.interact: drag to pan, scroll to zoom

mobile.tap: Tap location pin for details
Show tooltip for data point
mobile.longPress: Show full data in bottom sheet

desktop.interact: drag to reschedule or click for details

mobile.tap: Show task details in bottom sheet
Tap event for details in bottom sheet

safeAreas.description: Safe area insets prevent content from being obscured by notches, dynamic islands, or home indicators

implementation.generalRule: All fixed bottom elements must account for safe area inset

scrollBehavior.description: Enable momentum scrolling for natural scroll deceleration
scrollBehavior.overscrollDescription: Prevent overscroll from affecting parent scroll contexts

pullToRefresh.reason: App handles refresh via explicit controls in UI, not pull-to-refresh gesture

scrollSnapping.verticalPaginatedLists: snap-y mandatory with viewport height spacing

scrollIndicators.position: Floating on right edge, outside content area

gestureConflicts.description: Guidance for handling conflicts between multiple gestures

tapVsLongPress.strategy: Tap fires immediately with 500ms timeout before long-press activates
tapVsLongPress.longPressOutcome: Context menu appears if held after tap timeout

swipeVsScroll.strategy: Swipe locked to horizontal within interactive rows; scroll works for vertical page scroll
swipeVsScroll.edgeCases: Swipe actions disabled when scroll is vertical momentum scrolling

doubleTapVsZoom.strategy: Double-tap for action takes priority; pinch for zoom only works with two fingers

patterns.tap: Light haptic on successful tap detection
patterns.selection: Medium haptic on selection or toggle change
patterns.completion: Success (three short bursts) on form submission or important action
patterns.error: Warning (two medium bursts) on validation error or destructive action confirmation
patterns.longPress: Medium haptic at 500ms mark when long-press activates

screenReader.buttons: Announce state (enabled/disabled), type (button/toggle), and action description
screenReader.menus: Announce menu item count and current selection
screenReader.forms: Announce required fields, validation errors, and helper text
screenReader.dynamicContent: Use ARIA live regions to announce changes from gestures

motorImpairment.spacingBetweenTargets: Minimum 8px between touch targets to prevent accidental activation
motorImpairment.alternateInputs: Always provide alternative to gesture-only actions (buttons, menus)

reduceMotion.strategy: Gesture feedback still works, but animations shortened or removed

portrait.bottomSheets: Slide up to 80-90% of viewport height

landscape.bottomSheets: Side sheet or smaller bottom sheet to preserve horizontal space

small.adjustments: Single column layouts, larger touch targets, simplified navigation

medium.adjustments: Standard mobile layout, all gestures fully supported

large.adjustments: Tablet layout, two-column where appropriate, horizontal nav possible

xlarge.adjustments: Desktop or large tablet, desktop interactions can supplement mobile

bestPractices.consistency: Use same gesture for same action across entire app
bestPractices.discoverability: Show visual hints for gestures (e.g., drag handle for swipe, chevron for expand)
bestPractices.feedback: Always provide immediate feedback (visual, haptic, auditory) on gesture recognition
bestPractices.reversibility: Allow undo or easy cancellation for destructive gesture-based actions
bestPractices.progressive: Common actions via simple gestures; advanced actions via menus or secondary gestures
bestPractices.avoidAmbiguity: Don't use same gesture for conflicting actions in same context
